subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-21
subcodes.first_line: From Bandar-i-Jaz, Jamal-i-Mubarak went to Nur and there he taught... He entered the village and most of the inhabitants became believers.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
